LanguageData.VQE_CraftingDrone.label: crafting drone
LanguageData.VQE_CraftingDrone.description: An automated drone specialized in crafting. It periodically undergoes a special indexing operation, after which it produces a drone core that can be decoded to permanently unlock new drone schematics.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. Unlike other drones, crafting drones don’t require connection to drone transmitters.
LanguageData.VQE_CraftingDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
